name: cluster-A-fixed-width-records
goal: Read the CSV file at employees.csv (columns: id, name, department, salary) and produce a fixed-width text file at employees.txt with the following exact column layout, one record per line: columns 1-6 contain id (right-aligned, zero-padded to 6 chars), columns 7-30 contain name (left-aligned, space-padded to 24 chars), columns 31-50 contain department (left-aligned, space-padded to 20 chars), columns 51-60 contain salary (right-aligned, zero-padded to 10 chars). Every line must be exactly 60 characters wide. No header line. Use only ASCII characters. The first row of employees.csv has id=1, name='Alice Smith', department='Engineering', salary=95000.

notes.purpose: Tier 2 reflection-target case. Strict layout (60-char lines, exact zero-padding, exact column widths) is highly likely to fail first-attempt and trigger reflection on a width / padding / alignment mistake. The first regex pins the exact byte layout of row 1.
